title: Phase 8: SOS CoAP resource (/sos)
description: Add /sos to the Python node. PUT triggers an SOS beacon (repeats every 30 s, pre-empting normal traffic). DELETE cancels. Observable — all reachable nodes receive a notification and can relay/escalate. Exit criterion: SOS priority handling works end-to-end in the simulator.
close_reason: SosResource with activate/cancel/retrigger + PUT/DELETE/observe; 14 tests passing
